dish_name: Cheesy Ranch Sausage and Potato Skillet
description: A fast, comforting cheesy ranch chicken and potato skillet made with tender potatoes, browned chicken sausage, melted cheddar, and ranch seasoning. Pork-free and perfect for busy nights.
ingredients: [{"name": "smoked chicken sausage", "unit": "lb", "amount": "1"}, {"name": "baby potatoes", "unit": "lb", "amount": "1"}, {"name": "olive oil", "unit": "tbsp", "amount": "1"}, {"name": "butter", "unit": "tbsp", "amount": "1"}, {"name": "ranch seasoning", "unit": "packet", "amount": "1"}, {"name": "small onion", "unit": "small", "amount": "1"}, {"name": "garlic cloves", "unit": "cloves", "amount": "2"}, {"name": "chicken broth", "unit": "cup", "amount": "0.5"}, {"name": "shredded cheddar cheese", "unit": "cups", "amount": "1.25"}, {"name": "chopped parsley", "unit": "tbsp", "amount": "2"}, {"name": "Salt and pepper", "unit": null, "amount": "to taste"}]
instructions: Heat a skillet over medium heat. Add olive oil and chicken sausage; cook 4 minutes until lightly browned. Add butter, potatoes, and onion. Cook 6–7 minutes until potatoes begin to soften. Stir in garlic and ranch seasoning. Add broth, cover, and simmer 5 minutes until potatoes are tender. Sprinkle cheddar on top, cover, and melt. Finish with parsley, salt, and pepper. Serve warm.
notes: Meal Prep: Parboil potatoes ahead to shorten cooking. Storage: Refrigerate up to 3 days in an airtight container. Substitution: Use Monterey Jack for a milder cheese flavor. Serving Idea: Add a fried egg on top for a breakfast twist.
tags: cheesy ranch chicken skillet, chicken and potatoes skillet
